LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS BEING AFFILIATED WITH HOWARD AND RICE FOR 20 YEARS AND MET MS. LIEU IN PASSING OR NO PROFESSIONAL CONTACT WITH HER AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT TRACEY LUTTRELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 5 DO NOT ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY. EVEN ASSUMING CAUSE OF ACTION 6 ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE NON-PROTECTED FRAUD SEGMENT OF THAT CAUSE OF ACTION, AS TO WHICH THERE WOULD BE SOME DAMAGES OTHER THAN THAT THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARD AND THE AMOUNTS OWING FOR REPRESENTING DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)

EVEN ASSUMING CAUSE OF ACTION 6 ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE NON-PROTECTED FRAUD SEGMENT OF THAT CAUSE OF ACTION, AS TO WHICH THERE WOULD BE SOME DAMAGES OTHER THAN THAT THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARD AND THE AMOUNTS OWING FOR REPRESENTING DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND.
